title: ARIS-Movie-Director Wiki Edge
description: Schema for every line in wiki/edges.jsonl (one JSON object per line). The executable convention (engine writeWiki + cli/validate_wiki.py + the generated edges.jsonl) is src/dst/type — this schema documents that reality, not the legacy video-pipeline from/to/edge_type form.

type.description: comic-wiki edge vocabulary: attempt_of (attempt->panel), reviews (review->attempt), decides (decision->attempt), failure_of (failure_mode->attempt), rollback_of / supersedes (cross-frame repair links)

reviewer.description: OPTIONAL - on a 'reviews' edge, which reviewer produced it

verdict.description: OPTIONAL - on a 'decides' edge, the verdict (keep | retry_panel | rollback | accept_by_human)

evidence.description: OPTIONAL - free-text justification (e.g. a quoted reviewer line)

weight.description: OPTIONAL - confidence in [0,1] or a rubric score

created_at.description: OPTIONAL - logical order tag, NOT wall-clock (Date.now() is unavailable in the generation sandbox)
